channel.title: UK Think Tank Jobs
channel.description: Job listings for Think Tanks roles, scraped by Pol-Intel.

item.title: Director
item.description: The Centre for Policy Studies is currently recruiting for a new Director. Interested candidates should email for more information.
item.dc:creator: Centre for Policy Studies

item.title: Head of Strategy, Operations and Planning
item.description: Strategic leader role to shape and deliver Theos' vision at the intersection of faith, society and public debate. Drive organisational strategy, strengthen operational excellence, and support the Director. Full-time, permanent position.
item.dc:creator: Theos
